subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-17 in Budapest
subcodes.first_line: There are three types of freedom. The first is divine freedom, which is one of the inherent attributes of the Creator for He is unconstrained in His will
subcodes.first_line_orig: آزادی سه قسم است یک آزادی الهی است که بذات باری مخصوص است و اواست مختار مطلق
subcodes.subjects: @true liberty; freedom, @freedom of thought and action, @purpose; goal of creation, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
